title: verify-sigstore input
description: Input piped on stdin to `tinfoil-conformance verify-sigstore`. Covers Tinfoil's Sigstore policy layer (SPEC §5).

bundle_b64.description: Standard base64-encoded raw Sigstore bundle JSON bytes.

expected_digest_sha256_hex.description: Expected release artifact SHA-256 digest in hex. Per SPEC §7.3, comparison MUST be lowercase-normalized.

repo.description: GitHub owner/repo. Compared exactly against the cert's GitHubWorkflowRepository extension (SPEC §5.3).

workflow_ref_prefix.description: Required prefix on the cert's GitHubWorkflowRef extension (SPEC §5.3). Prefix match, not regex. Typically 'refs/tags/'.

predicate_types_allowed.description: Allow-list of predicate types (SPEC §5.5). null = any.

in_toto_statement_types_allowed.description: Allow-list of in-toto statement _type values. null = any. SPEC §5.4 is silent here; some SDKs pin to v0.1/v1.

payload_type.description: Required DSSE envelope payload_type (SPEC §5.4). Exact match. Typically 'application/vnd.in-toto+json'.

tlog_entries_max.description: Maximum allowed tlog entries. null = unbounded. SPEC §5.2 imposes no upper bound.

trust_root_b64.description: Base64-encoded Sigstore trusted_root.json (SPEC §5.1). SDKs MUST use this and not their embedded copy when this field is present.

verification_time_unix.description: Wall-clock seconds since UNIX epoch to use for ALL time comparisons (cert validity, Rekor integrated_time, log/key validity). Required to keep fixtures hermetic across years.
